title: AI for option trading
author: woop-1982
selftext:
Hi guys, I wanted to share with you a project i've been working on and it's an ongoing one. Since i'm not a programmer, this is my first backend+frontend project and i've edited a lot of it with AI, so i'd appreciate your feedback.

It's called TradeBuddy and it basically provides AI help and strategy analysis for options trading. On the AI segment you can ask it about volatility, option strategies and so on and on the strategy analysis part (which is a bit more developed in my opinion), you can get a look of how your strategy looks like, including time value and how it would look like if you increase/decrease IV, roll a few days forward as well as how can you adjust/hedge if the market or IV moves. 

I've also put a suggestion box at the bottom so feel free to drop any message of what can I do to improve. Appreciate you feedback, link in the comments. Of course it's completely free.
